description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push events, running on an ubuntu-24.04 environment. The workflow checks out the repository and submodules, installs dependencies, sets up Python 3.12, upgrades GCC to 14, configures and builds a project using CMake, and uploads artifacts for testing and release. Additionally, it publishes releases, sets up Sentry CLI, and uploads PDB files to Sentry for tagged builds.
